output.model_sql: WITH source AS (SELECT anon_id, experiment_id, variant, participation_date FROM participation_fact_enriched), random_sample AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY anon_id, experiment_id ORDER BY participation_date DESC) as rn FROM source)

decision_log.decision: Gathered full model context from DBT_MODELS and GitHub
decision_log.rationale: Model is a table materialization owned by @albert.hu, tagged pricing/daily. Upstream includes participation_fact_enriched and buyer_dim. No recent commits in last 48h.

tool_calls.input: SELECT NAME, MATERIALIZATION, SCHEMA_NAME, TAGS, JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(META, 'owner') as owner FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_MODELS WHERE NAME = 'gpm_repeat_buyer_dim'
